molecular_attribution.mechanistic_role: Disproportionality analysis in FAERS indicates significantly elevated reporting of cardiac thrombotic and embolic events, supporting the association.

molecular_attribution.limitations: FAERS signals are correlational and may be subject to reporting bias.

nodes.label: DrugBank metabolism context
nodes.impact_note: Retrieved metabolism knowledge places the drug in a metabolic context. Because no metabolism-specific probability driver was found in the baseline audit, it supports plausibility but does not independently raise the probability.
